result_schema.title: is_project
result_schema.guid_formula:
IF ICONTAINS([text_jput], 'ПродажаОАЭ')
   OR ICONTAINS([text_jput], 'ВторичныйРынок') THEN
    1
ELSE
    0
END
result_schema.formula:
IF ICONTAINS([tg_text], 'ПродажаОАЭ')
   OR ICONTAINS([tg_text], 'ВторичныйРынок') THEN
    1
ELSE
    0
END

result_schema.title: lead_fresh
result_schema.guid_formula:
IF [3a736f40-fd87-11ee-804f-19b8f87444a0] > 2 AND [date_full_er9j] IS NOT NULL THEN
    "Старше 2 Дней"
ELSEIF [3a736f40-fd87-11ee-804f-19b8f87444a0] < 2 AND [date_full_er9j] IS NOT NULL THEN
    "До 2 дней"
END
result_schema.formula:
IF [day_after_post] > 2 AND [tg_date] IS NOT NULL THEN
    "Старше 2 Дней"
ELSEIF [day_after_post] < 2 AND [tg_date] IS NOT NULL THEN
    "До 2 дней"
END
